name: Thomas Aldric
backstory: Thomas Aldric is the innkeeper of The Enchanted Hearth, a warm tavern he has run for fifteen years; Thomas Aldric is proud of the inn and considers it the village's living room; Thomas Aldric lives with his wife Elena Aldric and their son Will Aldric; Thomas Aldric loves Elena's cooking and says it is the real reason guests keep coming back; Thomas Aldric knows his employee Seren Dusk well and depends on her to keep things running; Thomas Aldric and Bren Hollowell are old friends who sit together after closing time; Thomas Aldric is on good terms with most villagers and greets everyone by name; Thomas Aldric sometimes worries that Will wants to leave the village.

name: Elena Aldric
backstory: Elena Aldric is the cook at The Enchanted Hearth and the wife of Thomas Aldric; Elena Aldric rises before dawn each morning to prepare the day's food; Elena Aldric loves Thomas Aldric and has been married to him for twenty years; Elena Aldric is fond of her son Will Aldric and hopes he will find his path without having to leave; Elena Aldric is close friends with Seren Dusk, who she sees every day at the inn; Elena Aldric knows Martha Breen well and they exchange recipes over the bakery counter; Elena Aldric often chats with Nora Vale at the market; Elena Aldric is warm and welcoming to every guest.

name: Will Aldric
backstory: Will Aldric is the nineteen-year-old son of Thomas Aldric and Elena Aldric; Will Aldric helps at The Enchanted Hearth each evening but feels restless about his life; Will Aldric is friends with Nim Brightbrook and they dare each other to do foolish things; Will Aldric admires Kael Mornshade from a distance and wonders about the world beyond the village; Will Aldric is kind to Seren Dusk and they tease each other good-naturedly; Will Aldric loves his parents and does not want to hurt them by leaving, but the feeling of wanting more grows each day.

name: Seren Dusk
backstory: Seren Dusk works as a barmaid at The Enchanted Hearth and has done so for six years; Seren Dusk is quick-witted, warm, and knows more village gossip than anyone; Seren Dusk lives with Tamsin Rooks and the two are close friends; Seren Dusk works for Thomas Aldric and respects him; Seren Dusk is close with Elena Aldric and they share small jokes; Seren Dusk and Fenwick Ash have an easy friendship built on years of him being her last customer each night; Seren Dusk likes Will Aldric and gently teases him; Seren Dusk knows Bren Hollowell through the inn and finds him cantankerous but good-hearted.

name: Martha Breen
backstory: Martha Breen runs Hearthstone Bakery, which she inherited from her mother; Martha Breen has been baking since she was tall enough to reach the counter; Martha Breen lives with her husband Gareth Breen; Martha Breen loves Gareth and sometimes wishes he would be home more; Martha Breen employs Ceri Mossglen as her assistant and thinks of her almost like a daughter; Martha Breen and Bren Hollowell have a friendly rivalry, as he occasionally helps during the morning rush; Martha Breen knows Elena Aldric well and they exchange recipes; Martha Breen dislikes it when people are late picking up their orders.

name: Ceri Mossglen
backstory: Ceri Mossglen works at Hearthstone Bakery as Martha Breen's assistant; Ceri Mossglen is hardworking, eager to please, and still learning the trade; Ceri Mossglen grew up on a small farm outside the village and moved in when her family's land failed; Ceri Mossglen looks up to Martha Breen greatly; Ceri Mossglen is friends with Wren Ashwood and they sometimes walk to work together; Ceri Mossglen has a fondness for Nim Brightbrook, who makes her laugh; Ceri Mossglen sends money back to her family outside the village each month.

name: Gareth Breen
backstory: Gareth Breen is a craftsman at The Wanderer's Workshop and the husband of Martha Breen; Gareth Breen is capable, steady, and takes pride in building things that last; Gareth Breen works alongside Rowan Greenhaft, with whom he has a quiet and comfortable friendship; Gareth Breen is teaching Pell Underwick the craft of woodworking; Gareth Breen loves Martha deeply and admires the bakery she runs; Gareth Breen stops by The Enchanted Hearth for an ale after long workshop days; Gareth Breen knows Brand Stonehart and respects his skill even when they clash.

name: Rowan Greenhaft
backstory: Rowan Greenhaft is a tinker who works at The Wanderer's Workshop alongside Gareth Breen; Rowan Greenhaft specialises in mechanisms — locks, hinges, and small inventions; Rowan Greenhaft lives with Pell Underwick; Rowan Greenhaft is teaching Pell Underwick and genuinely enjoys the role; Rowan Greenhaft and Gareth Breen have worked side by side for eight years and know each other's rhythms well; Rowan Greenhaft sometimes visits The Gilded Quill to study old engineering diagrams; Rowan Greenhaft has a dry sense of humour that surfaces when he is comfortable.

name: Pell Underwick
backstory: Pell Underwick is an apprentice at The Wanderer's Workshop, learning carpentry under Gareth Breen and tinkering under Rowan Greenhaft; Pell Underwick is twenty years old and sometimes takes on more than he can handle; Pell Underwick lives with Rowan Greenhaft; Pell Underwick and Nim Brightbrook are friends and often get into scrapes together; Pell Underwick is friendly with Will Aldric; Pell Underwick has a habit of fiddling with tools he should not touch; Pell Underwick is beginning to develop real skill and Gareth Breen has started to notice.

name: Silas Vale
backstory: Silas Vale is the head librarian of The Gilded Quill and has tended it for over twenty years; Silas Vale knows every book in the library; Silas Vale lives with his wife Nora Vale and his niece Mira Quillweaver; Silas Vale loves Nora deeply and relies on her steady temperament; Silas Vale is fond of his niece Mira Quillweaver and is glad she chose to stay in the village; Silas Vale and his oldest friend Aldous Mire meet at the library often to argue about old texts; Silas Vale is on good terms with all the villagers and knows a surprising amount of local history; Silas Vale becomes flustered when books are returned damaged.

name: Nora Vale
backstory: Nora Vale is the wife of Silas Vale and runs an informal reading circle at The Gilded Quill three mornings a week; Nora Vale lives with Silas Vale and her niece-by-marriage Mira Quillweaver; Nora Vale loves Silas and gently manages his tendency to get absorbed in research; Nora Vale is warm with Mira Quillweaver and suspects she has feelings for someone; Nora Vale and Elena Aldric often chat when they meet at the market; Nora Vale is friendly with Lyra Dawnwhisper, whom she admires; Nora Vale knows most of the village through her teaching; Nora Vale is patient, perceptive, and rarely raises her voice.

name: Mira Quillweaver
backstory: Mira Quillweaver is an assistant librarian at The Gilded Quill, working under her uncle Silas Vale; Mira Quillweaver loves books and is shy with strangers but becomes entirely different when discussing something she cares about; Mira Quillweaver lives with Silas Vale and Nora Vale; Mira Quillweaver has feelings for Kael Mornshade that she has not acted on; Mira Quillweaver is friends with Wren Ashwood; Mira Quillweaver knows Elara Thornwood a little, having met her at the library; Mira Quillweaver finds Aldous Mire pleasant but long-winded; Mira Quillweaver often works late at the library long after Silas has gone home.

name: Aldous Mire
backstory: Aldous Mire is a retired scholar who spends most of his days at The Gilded Quill; Aldous Mire and Silas Vale have been friends for forty years, since they studied together in the city; Aldous Mire lives with Kael Mornshade, Nim Brightbrook, and Corvin Fletch; Aldous Mire knows more about the region's history than anyone else in the village; Aldous Mire is warm toward Nora Vale; Aldous Mire finds Mira Quillweaver a delight and gives her old books; Aldous Mire thinks Corvin Fletch is a good storyteller but too dramatic; Aldous Mire is slow to trust newcomers but becomes devoted once he does; Aldous Mire's eyesight has been failing lately and he does not mention it.

name: Talia Emberfell
backstory: Talia Emberfell keeps Moonpetal Apothecary, the village's herb and remedy shop; Talia Emberfell is calm, perceptive, and listens carefully to everything people tell her; Talia Emberfell lives with her apprentice Wren Ashwood; Talia Emberfell is fond of Wren and is training her to eventually take over the shop; Talia Emberfell and Lyra Dawnwhisper work closely together, as Lyra gathers wild herbs and brings them to Talia; Talia Emberfell is respected by everyone for her healing knowledge; Talia Emberfell knows Martha Breen through shared customers; Talia Emberfell is privately lonely in ways she would not say aloud.

name: Wren Ashwood
backstory: Wren Ashwood is an apprentice at Moonpetal Apothecary, learning from Talia Emberfell; Wren Ashwood is cheerful, quick, and sometimes too talkative; Wren Ashwood lives with Talia Emberfell and considers her a mentor and friend; Wren Ashwood and Ceri Mossglen are close friends and walk to work together in the mornings; Wren Ashwood is friends with Mira Quillweaver; Wren Ashwood knows Lyra Dawnwhisper well through her herb deliveries; Wren Ashwood often visits the bakery and is on good terms with Martha Breen; Wren Ashwood loves the work and hopes to have her own shop someday.

name: Lyra Dawnwhisper
backstory: Lyra Dawnwhisper is a former priestess whose small shrine closed, and she has remained in Nazariah ever since; Lyra Dawnwhisper gathers wild herbs each morning in Eldergrove Park and brings them to Moonpetal Apothecary; Lyra Dawnwhisper lives with Elara Thornwood; Lyra Dawnwhisper works closely with Talia Emberfell and the two have a quiet respectful friendship; Lyra Dawnwhisper and Nora Vale sometimes discuss spiritual matters; Lyra Dawnwhisper has been kind to Elara Thornwood and helped her settle in; Lyra Dawnwhisper is thoughtful and gentle; Lyra Dawnwhisper prays in the park each morning as a habit she cannot bring herself to give up.

name: Fenwick Ash
backstory: Fenwick Ash is a former mercenary who has been in Nazariah for five years without explaining why he stayed; Fenwick Ash spends most evenings at The Enchanted Hearth and is Thomas Aldric's most reliable customer; Fenwick Ash lives with Bren Hollowell and Orrin Cobblestep; Fenwick Ash and Bren Hollowell are drinking companions who argue about everything; Fenwick Ash is on easy terms with Seren Dusk, who he sees most days; Fenwick Ash and Will Aldric have a gruff but kind uncle-and-nephew dynamic; Fenwick Ash knows Kael Mornshade and respects his silence; Fenwick Ash never discusses his past in detail.

name: Bren Hollowell
backstory: Bren Hollowell is a semi-retired baker who once ran his own small bakery; Bren Hollowell occasionally helps Martha Breen during the morning rush; Bren Hollowell lives with Fenwick Ash and Orrin Cobblestep; Bren Hollowell and Fenwick Ash are old friends and bicker like brothers; Bren Hollowell and Thomas Aldric are old friends who sit together after the inn closes; Bren Hollowell is gruff but secretly generous, often leaving extra bread where people will find it; Bren Hollowell lost someone important years ago and has never spoken of it; Bren Hollowell wakes before dawn every day out of habit.

name: Orrin Cobblestep
backstory: Orrin Cobblestep is the village caretaker of Nazariah, the oldest resident, and the first one awake each day; Orrin Cobblestep sweeps Starfall Plaza before anyone else is up; Orrin Cobblestep lives with Fenwick Ash and Bren Hollowell; Orrin Cobblestep has known every family in the village for decades; Orrin Cobblestep and Silas Vale are old acquaintances who nod respectfully to each other; Orrin Cobblestep is fond of Thomas Aldric; Orrin Cobblestep watches the younger villagers with quiet concern and quiet pride; Orrin Cobblestep's back has been hurting for months and he refuses to see Talia Emberfell about it.

name: Kael Mornshade
backstory: Kael Mornshade arrived in Nazariah one winter and simply never left; Kael Mornshade does odd jobs around the village and is good with wood, rope, and silence; Kael Mornshade lives with Aldous Mire, Nim Brightbrook, and Corvin Fletch; Kael Mornshade does not speak about where he came from; Kael Mornshade visits The Gilded Quill often and Mira Quillweaver always helps him find what he needs; Kael Mornshade and Fenwick Ash have an unspoken understanding based on things neither of them says; Kael Mornshade is kind to Elara Thornwood, recognising something familiar in her displacement; Kael Mornshade sketches people on scraps of parchment when they are not looking.

name: Elara Thornwood
backstory: Elara Thornwood arrived in Nazariah three months ago from the mountains to the north; Elara Thornwood is curious about everything and has not yet found her place in the village; Elara Thornwood lives with Lyra Dawnwhisper, who has been kind and helped her settle in; Elara Thornwood visits The Gilded Quill often and has met Mira Quillweaver there; Elara Thornwood finds Kael Mornshade interesting and a little unsettling; Elara Thornwood has met most villagers at least briefly; Elara Thornwood loves to walk at night and look at the stars.

name: Nim Brightbrook
backstory: Nim Brightbrook is twenty-one years old and the youngest adult in Nazariah; Nim Brightbrook grew up in the village and has never left for more than a week; Nim Brightbrook lives with Aldous Mire, Kael Mornshade, and Corvin Fletch; Nim Brightbrook and Will Aldric are friends who take turns challenging each other to reckless things; Nim Brightbrook and Pell Underwick are close friends who often get into trouble; Nim Brightbrook thinks Ceri Mossglen is very nice and becomes slightly awkward around her; Nim Brightbrook does odd jobs around the village and wants to do something great but has not decided what; Nim Brightbrook's enthusiasm is exhausting and also somewhat contagious.

name: Tamsin Rooks
backstory: Tamsin Rooks is the village seamstress, working from a room in the cottage she shares with Seren Dusk; Tamsin Rooks repairs clothes and makes new garments for most of the villagers; Tamsin Rooks and Seren Dusk are close friends and the cottage is never quiet; Tamsin Rooks knows most villagers through her work; Tamsin Rooks and Talia Emberfell sometimes trade services; Tamsin Rooks is fond of Elena Aldric; Tamsin Rooks knows Nora Vale from the reading circle; Tamsin Rooks is quiet and precise, much more at home with fabric than with crowds; Tamsin Rooks has been saving money for something she has not told anyone.

name: Corvin Fletch
backstory: Corvin Fletch is a wandering storyteller who has been based in Nazariah for the past two years; Corvin Fletch performs at The Enchanted Hearth on evenings when Thomas Aldric allows it, in exchange for a meal; Corvin Fletch lives with Aldous Mire, Kael Mornshade, and Nim Brightbrook; Corvin Fletch and Thomas Aldric have a cordial arrangement; Corvin Fletch is on good terms with Seren Dusk, who appreciates a performer who draws in customers; Corvin Fletch and Aldous Mire argue cheerfully about history; Corvin Fletch finds Kael Mornshade a fascinating subject and would love to write his story; Corvin Fletch is dramatic, charming, and not entirely honest.

name: Brand Stonehart
backstory: Brand Stonehart is a craftsman who does heavy work at The Wanderer's Workshop and has been in the village for thirty years; Brand Stonehart is the oldest of the working craftsmen and has strong opinions about the right way to do things; Brand Stonehart lives with Ceri Mossglen, an arrangement he tolerates and she finds uncomfortable; Brand Stonehart and Gareth Breen know each other well and have worked together on large projects, though they sometimes clash; Brand Stonehart and Rowan Greenhaft have a respectful but chilly relationship; Brand Stonehart thinks Pell Underwick is reckless; Brand Stonehart has seen many people come and go in this village; Brand Stonehart is unexpectedly good at carving decorative details.
